visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on an older Asian man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a white collared shirt. He is in a dimly lit room, possibly a kitchen, with dark wooden shelves in the background holding a few white bowls. In the top left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a white, stylized font. The camera remains static throughout the clip. The man holds a black smartphone to his right ear, listening intently with a serious and concerned expression. A man speaks in a low, serious, and urgent tone, his voice filled with concern as he asks, "有没有人跟着你？" (Is anyone following you?). After a brief pause, he lowers his head slightly, his expression becoming more pensive, before speaking again into the phone. He then gives a firm, commanding instruction, "继续逛。" (Keep looking around.). The background is quiet, with no music or other distracting sounds, emphasizing the gravity of the conversation.
